mapper.select:
SELECT consumer_id AS consumerId, song_id AS songId, COUNT(1) AS playCount FROM play_record
WHERE play_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
GROUP BY consumer_id, song_id
SELECT user_id AS consumerId, song_id AS songId FROM collect WHERE type = 0 AND song_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT r.consumer_id AS consumerId, ls.song_id AS songId, r.score AS score FROM rank_list r INNER JOIN list_song ls ON r.song_list_id = ls.song_list_id
WHERE r.score >= #{minScore}
